[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 11/24 (Mon), Lesson reward will be doubled!
Don't miss out on this opportunity to power up your students!

🗓️Period: 11/24 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 12/1 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
